rationale: The cited paper appears highly relevant to the citing paper’s core theory and outcomes: both study ethnic salience/self-awareness and how it moderates responses to ethnically targeted advertising (e.g., spokesperson effects, targetedness, ad response). The citing note explicitly says it extends prior distinctiveness-based consumer work and replicates earlier local minority effects, which plausibly includes this cited 2001 JMR study on ethnic self-awareness priming. Given this close conceptual overlap and explicit DOI-matched reference, this is not an obvious incidental mention.
